title: Hebrew Month Start Calendar Calculator
description: Schema for astronomical rule inputs and calculated Hebrew month start date outputs used by the HebrewMonthStartCalendar calculator node.

domain.description: Primary SSA domain this calculator belongs to. Calendar and feast planning are treated as storehouse-level planning.

inputs.description: Inputs required to compute Hebrew month start dates from astronomical data.

rulePresetId.description: Which month-start rule preset to apply when computing the Hebrew month starts.

location.description: Geographic location and timezone context for astronomy calculations.

gregorianYear.description: Gregorian year used as the primary planning window for which to compute Hebrew month starts.

epochStartDate.description: Optional explicit start date for the planning epoch. If provided, the calculator may span across gregorianYear as needed.

epochEndDate.description: Optional explicit end date for the planning epoch. If omitted, a default window based on gregorianYear is used.

timeDataRef.description: Optional reference ID to a pre-imported timeanddate.com (or similar) dataset containing sun/moon/star events for the location and time range.

options.description: Advanced options for fine-tuning the astronomical calculations.

allowThirteenthMonth.description: Whether to allow a leap month (13th month) to be calculated for leap years in the Hebrew cycle.

includeStarCheck.description: If true, star/constellation data will be used when available to confirm start-of-season boundaries.

maxMonthCount.description: Safety guard to limit the number of Hebrew months calculated in a single run.

outputs.description: Calculated Hebrew month starts and related metadata used by downstream planners (calendar grid, feasts, meals, storehouse).

months.description: List of Hebrew months with their corresponding Gregorian start dates.

monthIndex.description: Hebrew month index (1–12 normally, 13 for leap years if enabled).

gregorianStartDate.description: Gregorian calendar date that marks the observable start of this Hebrew month at the given location.

rulePresetId.description: Rule preset actually used for this month. May differ from inputs.rulePresetId if a fallback or override was applied.

location.description: Location snapshot used when computing this month.

flags.description: Signals about the calculation for this month: boundary conditions, ambiguous events, or data-quality notes.

notes.description: Human-readable notes for this month’s calculation (e.g., describing special cases or overrides).

summary.description: Helpful aggregate values for UI and downstream planners.

firstMonthIndex.description: Index of the first month in the calculated planning window.

lastMonthIndex.description: Index of the last month in the calculated planning window.

firstGregorianDate.description: Gregorian date of the first calculated month start in the window.

lastGregorianDate.description: Gregorian date of the last calculated month start in the window.

rulePresetId.description: Rule preset used for this run at the summary level.

metadata.description: Optional metadata about the calculation run for logging, analytics, and debugging.

calculatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the calculator produced this output.

source.description: Identifier for the upstream source, e.g., 'timeanddate.com:import-2025-01' or 'localCSV:my-moon-data.csv'.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings emitted while calculating month starts (e.g., missing data days, partial imports).
